backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as backend placeholder with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including safeFetch utility, Binance API integration, universe filtering with fallback logic, and RSI-based trading strategy components with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript files including types, services (Binance API, RSI calculation, universe filtering, entry gates, risk management, exit evaluation), store management, engine loop, utilities, and React components for the G100 RSI 3-timeframe trading engine.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI elements (background, foreground, card, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, borders, charts, sidebar).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the G100 RSI 3TF Paper Engine application with viewport meta tag and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with tabbed interface (TOP5, TRADES, STATS, LOGS), header with title, ErrorBoundary wrapper, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class component implementing error boundary that catches UI crashes, displays error details with stack trace, and provides RESET STORAGE button to clear localStorage and reload the page.
frontend/src/components/LogsTab.tsx: Logs panel component displaying chronological event log with color-coded event types (red for failures, yellow for warnings/retries, green for success, blue for info) and JSON payload display in scrollable area.
frontend/src/components/StatsTab.tsx: Statistics dashboard displaying trading performance metrics in card grid: total trades, win rate, average win/loss, expectancy, profit factor, max drawdown, and current equity with color-coded positive/negative values.
frontend/src/components/SymbolCard.tsx: Displays a trading symbol card with RSI indicators (15m, 5m, 1m), entry/exit prices (stop loss, take profit levels), gate status checks, and visual status badges (OPEN, COOLDOWN, SIGNAL_READY, IDLE).
frontend/src/components/Top5Tab.tsx: Main dashboard tab showing engine controls (start/stop/reset), equity display, and a grid of SymbolCard components for top 5 symbols plus open positions.
frontend/src/components/TradesTab.tsx: Displays a filterable table of closed trades with time/symbol filters and CSV/JSON export functionality, showing entry/exit times, PnL, duration, and exit reasons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor with authentication, automatically recreating it when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity state management, and AuthClient configuration for ICP integration.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components like cards, buttons, borders, and charts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/services/binanceApi.ts: Binance REST API service providing functions to fetch 24h ticker data for universe selection and kline/candlestick data for multiple timeframes using safeFetch transport.
frontend/src/services/engineLoop.ts: Main trading engine loop that runs every 15 seconds, refreshes TOP5 symbols every 15 minutes, fetches 1m klines for watched symbols, calculates RSI for TOP5 symbols, evaluates entry gates, opens positions, and manages exits with cooldown logic.
frontend/src/services/entryGates.ts: Evaluates three entry gates for trade signals: 15m RSI between 55-70, 5m RSI above 50, and 1m RSI crossing above 45, returning whether all gates pass.
frontend/src/services/exitEvaluator.ts: Evaluates exit conditions (stop-loss, TP1, TP2, 45-minute time stop), calculates PnL, and creates trade records when positions are closed.
frontend/src/services/riskManager.ts: Calculates position sizing with 1% risk, 0.6% stop-loss distance, 5x leverage, and validates against max 2 open positions, symbol cooldowns, and 90% margin limit.
frontend/src/services/rsiCalculator.ts: Calculates RSI using Wilder's smoothing method with a default 27-period, handling edge cases for zero gains/losses.
frontend/src/services/universeFilter.ts: Filters USDT pairs by excluding stablecoins, major coins, and low-volume pairs (< 5M), sorts by volume, selects TOP5, and falls back to first 20 USDT pairs if filtering yields no results.
frontend/src/store/engineStore.ts: Zustand store with persistence managing engine state (equity, positions, trades, logs, cooldowns, TOP5 symbols, RSI cache) and actions for starting/stopping engine, updating state, and calculating statistics.
frontend/src/types/binance.ts: TypeScript types for Binance API responses including exchange info, 24hr tickers, and kline (candlestick) data in both raw and parsed formats.
frontend/src/types/store.ts: TypeScript types for store state including Position, Trade, Stats, LogEntry with 20+ event types, ClosedCandle, RSICache, and EngineStore interface with persisted and runtime-only fields.
frontend/src/utils/delay.ts: Simple async delay utility function that returns a Promise resolving after specified milliseconds.
frontend/src/utils/exportTrades.ts: Exports trade history to CSV or JSON files with timestamped filenames using browser download mechanism.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Formatting utilities for currency, percentages, timestamps, durations, and numbers with safety checks for undefined and non-finite values.
frontend/src/utils/safeFetch.ts: Provides a safeFetch utility with 5s timeout, 2 retries with 500ms delay, and comprehensive error handling that logs retry/failure events to engineStore and returns null on final failure instead of throwing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode support, custom OKLCH color system for UI components (primary, secondary, destructive, muted, accent, sidebar, chart colors), responsive container settings, custom animations (accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document (v7) describing a frontend-only paper trading bot for LONG positions on TOP5 USDT symbols using RSI(27) 3-timeframe strategy with strict entry/exit rules, 1% risk per trade, Zustand persistence, mobile-first UI, and deterministic closed-candle logic with monotonic guards to prevent state corruption.
